name: Fulfillment
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The "},{"text":"Fulfillments","bold":true},{"text":" tab is your centralized hub to track how each order is being processed, picked, packed, and shipped — making it easier to manage post-order operations. Whether you're overseeing dozens or thousands of orders, this tab helps you stay in control by surfacing the "},{"text":"status of fulfillment, payment, inventory movements, and timelines","bold":true},{"text":" — all in one place."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The "},{"text":"Fulfillments tab","bold":true},{"text":" is designed to answer one key question: “What is the current status of each order in terms of being fulfilled and shipped?”"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"It offers a real-time view of all fulfillment activities — helping your team coordinate between order management, warehouse handling, and logistics execution."}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"\nTo access, "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"go to Orders >>
